product_overview: A role-based, branch-aware backend for retail operations covering authentication, branch and product management, POS checkout, inventory, customer orders, HR/payroll, loyalty, accounting, analytics, and real-time notifications. The system is designed for strict multi-tenancy by branch, transactional stock operations, and durable WebSocket-backed alerts.
core_goals: Authenticate users and enforce role/branch-based access control across all modules
Support branch CRUD, product catalog maintenance, and branch-scoped inventory tracking
Enable cashier POS checkout, receipts, voids, and recent-sales lookups with idempotency
Track stock receipts, expiry, adjustments, transfers, returns, and low-stock alerts
Provide customer ordering with optional online payment and order fulfillment workflows
Manage loyalty wallets, points adjustments, and tiered settings for customers and staff
Run HR workflows including employees, attendance, leave, salary structures, payroll, and payroll settings
Deliver accounting ledgers, expenses, profit/loss reporting, and analytics across branches
Persist and deliver real-time notifications for operational events such as stock, transfers, and expiry

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Users can sign up, log in, verify OTPs, recover passwords, and change their passwords with JWT-based access control.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/auth/signup with a new customer email and password -> Receive 201 with customer account and OTP expiry -> POST /api/v1/auth/verify-otp with email and 6-digit OTP -> Receive 200 confirmation -> POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with accessToken and refreshToken
POST /api/v1/auth/login with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 Invalid credentials
POST /api/v1/auth/forgot-password with registered email -> Receive 200 generic message -> POST /api/v1/auth/reset-password with email, OTP, and newPassword -> Receive 200 password reset confirmation
POST /api/v1/auth/verify-otp with an expired or invalid OTP -> Receive 400 Invalid or expired OTP

features.name: Users Management
features.description: Authenticated users can view and update their own profile, upload avatars, and customers can select a preferred branch; admins can manage staff accounts.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/users/profile with a valid JWT -> Receive 200 current user profile -> PATCH /api/v1/users/profile with updated firstName and phone -> Receive 200 updated user profile -> POST /api/v1/users/profile/avatar with a valid image file -> Receive 200 updated user profile with avatar
PATCH /api/v1/users/me/branch with a customer JWT and valid branchId -> Receive 200 updated customer profile with preferred branch
PATCH /api/v1/users/me/branch with a non-customer role -> Receive 403 Only customers can use this endpoint
POST /api/v1/users with admin JWT and new ADMIN/MANAGER/CASHIER payload -> Receive 201 created staff user -> POST /api/v1/users with an existing email -> Receive 409 Email exists

features.name: Branches Management
features.description: Admins manage branch records, while authenticated users can list and view branches and managers can view branch performance.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/branches with admin JWT and valid branch data -> Receive 201 created branch -> GET /api/v1/branches -> Receive 200 branch list -> GET /api/v1/branches/:id -> Receive 200 branch details
POST /api/v1/branches with duplicate code -> Receive 409 Code already exists
GET /api/v1/branches/my-performance with manager JWT -> Receive 200 branch KPI summary
PATCH /api/v1/branches/:id/toggle-active with admin JWT -> Receive 200 updated branch active state

features.name: Products Catalog
features.description: Admins and managers can create and maintain products, images, categories, and barcode lookup, while authenticated users can browse the catalog.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/products with admin or manager JWT and product details -> Receive 201 created product -> POST /api/v1/products/:id/image with a valid image file -> Receive 200 updated product with image
GET /api/v1/products -> Receive 200 product list -> GET /api/v1/products/categories -> Receive 200 category list -> GET /api/v1/products/barcode/:barcode -> Receive 200 product details
PATCH /api/v1/products/:id with updated fields -> Receive 200 updated product
POST /api/v1/products/:id/image with a file larger than 2MB -> Receive 413 File too large
GET /api/v1/products/:id with a missing id -> Receive 404 Not found

features.name: Admin Portal
features.description: Admins and selected managers can access system-wide operational views, branch comparisons, admin user lists, and inventory matrix reporting.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/admin/overview with admin JWT -> Receive 200 KPI overview -> GET /api/v1/admin/branches -> Receive 200 branches with metadata -> GET /api/v1/admin/inventory/matrix -> Receive 200 inventory matrix report
POST /api/v1/admin/comparison with branchIds and ISO date range -> Receive 200 branch comparison response
GET /api/v1/admin/admins with admin JWT -> Receive 200 list of admin users
GET /api/v1/admin/overview with non-admin role -> Receive authorization failure

features.name: Inventory Core
features.description: Admins and managers maintain per-branch stock records, update stock quantities, and review low-stock inventory.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/inventory with productId, branchId, and quantity -> Receive 201 created inventory record -> GET /api/v1/inventory/branch/:branchId -> Receive 200 inventory items for that branch -> GET /api/v1/inventory/low-stock -> Receive 200 low-stock inventory list
PATCH /api/v1/inventory/:id/stock with updated quantity and threshold -> Receive 200 updated inventory record
GET /api/v1/inventory/branch/:branchId with a malformed or unauthorized branchId -> Receive 200 or empty results without branch enforcement
PATCH /api/v1/inventory/:id/stock for a missing inventory record -> Receive 404 Not found

features.name: Product Batch and Expiry Tracking
features.description: Staff record goods-receipt batches, track expiry dates, list batches, generate expiry reports, and scan for soon-expiring stock alerts.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/inventory/batches with productId, expiryDate, and quantity -> Receive 201 created product batch and inventory increment -> GET /api/v1/inventory/batches?productId=... -> Receive 200 batch list -> GET /api/v1/inventory/expiry/report?withinDays=30 -> Receive 200 expiry report rows
POST /api/v1/inventory/expiry/scan with admin JWT -> Receive 200 branchesAffected and notificationsSent
POST /api/v1/inventory/batches with invalid quantity for a unit-based product -> Receive 400 validation error
GET /api/v1/inventory/expiry/report with branch access outside the actor scope -> Receive 403 Branch access denied

features.name: Sales Returns
features.description: Admins and managers can look up sales by invoice and process returns with good/bad quantity splits and optional restocking.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/returns/lookup?invoiceNumber=INV123 with manager JWT -> Receive 200 returnable sale lines -> POST /api/v1/returns with saleId and return lines -> Receive 201 created sales return
GET /api/v1/returns?branchId=...&page=1&limit=20 with manager JWT -> Receive 200 paginated return list
GET /api/v1/returns/lookup with a voided sale invoice -> Receive 400 Sale is voided
POST /api/v1/returns with quantities exceeding remaining quantity -> Receive 400 Return exceeds remaining quantity

features.name: Stock Adjustments
features.description: Admins and managers create reason-coded stock corrections, and admins can approve or reverse pending adjustments.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/stock-adjustments with productId, reason, and physicalQuantity -> Receive 201 created adjustment -> GET /api/v1/stock-adjustments -> Receive 200 adjustment list -> PATCH /api/v1/stock-adjustments/:id/approve -> Receive 200 approved adjustment applied to inventory
PATCH /api/v1/stock-adjustments/:id/reverse on an approved adjustment -> Receive 200 reversed adjustment
POST /api/v1/stock-adjustments with invalid values -> Receive 400 validation error
PATCH /api/v1/stock-adjustments/:id/approve on a non-pending record -> Receive 400 Already approved or rejected

features.name: POS Checkout
features.description: Cashiers and authorized supervisors can complete legacy and multi-tender checkouts, using idempotency keys to prevent duplicate sales.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/pos/transactions with X-Idempotency-Key and valid items -> Receive 201 created legacy sale -> GET /api/v1/pos/transactions -> Receive 200 cashier transactions -> GET /api/v1/pos/transactions/:id -> Receive 200 sale details
POST /api/v1/pos/sales with customerUserId or loyaltyCustomerId, cart, and payment payload -> Receive 201 create-sale response with receipt/payment details
POST /api/v1/pos/transactions with the same X-Idempotency-Key and identical payload -> Receive 409 Sale creation conflict
POST /api/v1/pos/sales with both customerUserId and loyaltyCustomerId set -> Receive 400 validation or business error

features.name: POS Read Endpoints
features.description: Cashier-facing lookup APIs support product search, unit conversion, stock preview, invoice preview, recent sales, and customer search.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/pos/products/search?q=milk -> Receive 200 matching products -> GET /api/v1/pos/products/:productId/units -> Receive 200 sellable units -> GET /api/v1/pos/products/:productId/inventory -> Receive 200 branch inventory quantity
GET /api/v1/pos/invoice-number -> Receive 200 next invoice number preview -> GET /api/v1/pos/recent-sales -> Receive 200 recent sales list
GET /api/v1/pos/customers/search?q=0112 -> Receive 200 customer matches
GET /api/v1/pos/products/search with missing q parameter -> Receive validation failure
GET /api/v1/pos/products/:productId/inventory for a product with no inventory record -> Receive 404 No inventory record

features.name: POS Print and Void
features.description: Staff can record receipt prints and authorized roles can void completed sales with restocking and accounting reversal.
user_flows: PATCH /api/v1/pos/sales/:id/print with cashier JWT -> Receive 200 sale marked as printed -> POST /api/v1/pos/sales/:id/void with reason -> Receive 200 voided sale
POST /api/v1/pos/sales/:id/void with a sale that cannot be voided -> Receive 400 Cannot void this status
POST /api/v1/pos/sales/:id/void for a sale already voided -> Receive 409 Already voided
PATCH /api/v1/pos/sales/:id/print for a foreign branch sale -> Receive 404 Not found or foreign branch

features.name: POS Dashboards
features.description: Role-specific dashboards summarize sales activity and transaction statistics for cashiers, managers, and admins.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/pos/my-dashboard with cashier JWT -> Receive 200 cashier dashboard metrics
GET /api/v1/pos/admin-dashboard with manager or admin JWT -> Receive 200 dashboard aggregates
GET /api/v1/pos/my-transactions -> Receive 200 current-user transaction summary
GET /api/v1/pos/all-transactions with non-admin JWT -> Receive authorization failure

features.name: Stock Transfers
features.description: Branches can request, approve, ship, receive, reject, or cancel stock transfers through a controlled transfer state machine.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/stock-transfers with productId and requestedQuantity -> Receive 201 pending stock transfer request -> PATCH /api/v1/stock-transfers/:id/approve with sourceBranchId and approvedQuantity -> Receive 200 approved transfer -> PATCH /api/v1/stock-transfers/:id/ship -> Receive 200 transfer in transit -> PATCH /api/v1/stock-transfers/:id/receive -> Receive 200 completed transfer
POST /api/v1/stock-transfers/admin-direct with sourceBranchId, destinationBranchId, and lines -> Receive 201 approved transfer requests created atomically
POST /api/v1/stock-transfers/manager-batch with bulk lines -> Receive 201 pending transfers for the manager's branch
PATCH /api/v1/stock-transfers/:id/reject with rejectionReason -> Receive 200 rejected transfer
PATCH /api/v1/stock-transfers/:id/ship from a non-source branch -> Receive 403 Source branch mismatch
PATCH /api/v1/stock-transfers/:id/approve when stock is insufficient -> Receive 400 Cannot approve status or insufficient stock

features.name: Customer Orders
features.description: Customers can create pickup orders, view their own orders, and staff can accept, reject, fulfill, or cancel them; PayHere online payments are supported via webhook.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/customer-orders with branchId, items, and paymentMode -> Receive 201 order and optional PayHere checkout payload -> GET /api/v1/customer-orders/mine -> Receive 200 customer order list -> PATCH /api/v1/customer-orders/:id/cancel -> Receive 200 canceled order
GET /api/v1/customer-orders/code/:code without authentication -> Receive 200 customer order details
PATCH /api/v1/customer-orders/:id/accept with staff JWT -> Receive 200 accepted order -> POST /api/v1/customer-orders/code/:code/fulfill with cash payment -> Receive 201 sale receipt
POST /api/v1/customer-orders/payhere/notify with signed callback payload -> Receive 200 status acknowledgement
GET /api/v1/customer-orders/code/:code with an unknown code -> Receive 404 Not found
POST /api/v1/customer-orders/payhere/notify with invalid signature or payload -> Receive 400 Validation or signature error

features.name: Shop Catalog
features.description: Customers browse active branches, product categories, recommendations, and branch-specific product stock for shopping and ordering.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/shop/branches -> Receive 200 active branches -> GET /api/v1/shop/products?branchId=... -> Receive 200 product list for the branch -> GET /api/v1/shop/products/categories -> Receive 200 product categories
GET /api/v1/shop/products/recommended?branchId=... -> Receive 200 recommended products -> GET /api/v1/shop/products/:id?branchId=... -> Receive 200 product with branch stock
GET /api/v1/shop/products/:id without a matching product or branch -> Receive 404 Not found

features.name: Accounting
features.description: Admins manage ledger summaries, ledger entries, expenses, expense review, deletions, and profit-and-loss analysis.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/accounting/ledger/summary with admin JWT -> Receive 200 credit/debit summary -> GET /api/v1/accounting/ledger -> Receive 200 ledger entries -> GET /api/v1/accounting/profit-loss -> Receive 200 P and L metrics
POST /api/v1/accounting/expenses with branchId, category, amount, and expenseDate -> Receive 200 created expense -> GET /api/v1/accounting/expenses -> Receive 200 expense list
PATCH /api/v1/accounting/expenses/:id/review with status APPROVED -> Receive 200 reviewed expense
DELETE /api/v1/accounting/expenses/:id for a non-pending or foreign-branch expense -> Receive 403 Cannot delete other branch or non-pending

features.name: Branch Analytics
features.description: Admins and managers can compare branch performance across selected analytical sections over a date range.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/branch-analytics/comparison with branchIds and date range -> Receive 200 branch comparison result
POST /api/v1/admin/comparison with branchIds and date range -> Receive 200 branch comparison response
POST /api/v1/branch-analytics/comparison with invalid or inverted date inputs -> Receive validation or business error

features.name: Notifications
features.description: Authenticated users can list, view, and mark notifications as read; operational alerts are also pushed in real time over WebSockets.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/notifications -> Receive 200 own notifications -> GET /api/v1/notifications/:id -> Receive 200 notification details -> PATCH /api/v1/notifications/read-all -> Receive 200 all own notifications marked read
PATCH /api/v1/notifications/:id/read -> Receive 200 notification marked read
GET /api/v1/notifications/:id for a notification not owned by the user -> Receive 404 Not found

features.name: Loyalty Customer
features.description: Customers can view their loyalty wallet and history, while cashiers and managers can look up or enroll loyalty customers by phone.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/loyalty/settings -> Receive 200 loyalty configuration -> GET /api/v1/loyalty/me -> Receive 200 own points summary -> GET /api/v1/loyalty/me/history -> Receive 200 loyalty ledger history
GET /api/v1/loyalty/lookup?phone=... with cashier JWT -> Receive 200 loyalty lookup result -> POST /api/v1/loyalty/enroll with phone and name -> Receive 200 enrolled loyalty customer
POST /api/v1/loyalty/enroll with a phone already linked -> Receive 400 Phone already linked or already enrolled
GET /api/v1/loyalty/lookup with no existing loyalty account -> Receive 404 No loyalty account

features.name: Loyalty Admin
features.description: Admins manage loyalty settings, customer lists, histories, dashboards, and manual point adjustments.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/admin/loyalty/settings -> Receive 200 loyalty settings -> PATCH /api/v1/admin/loyalty/settings -> Receive 200 updated settings -> GET /api/v1/admin/loyalty/dashboard -> Receive 200 dashboard stats
GET /api/v1/admin/loyalty/customers?search=... -> Receive 200 loyalty customer list -> GET /api/v1/admin/loyalty/customers/:userId/history -> Receive 200 customer loyalty history
POST /api/v1/admin/loyalty/customers/:userId/adjust with positive or negative points -> Receive 200 adjustment applied
POST /api/v1/admin/loyalty/customers/:userId/adjust that would drive balance below zero -> Receive 400 Cannot deduct more than current balance

features.name: Loyalty Manager
features.description: Managers can view branch-scoped loyalty customer lists, histories, and dashboards for their assigned branch.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/manager/loyalty/customers -> Receive 200 branch loyalty customers -> GET /api/v1/manager/loyalty/customers/:userId/history -> Receive 200 customer loyalty history -> GET /api/v1/manager/loyalty/dashboard -> Receive 200 branch loyalty dashboard
GET /api/v1/manager/loyalty/customers as a manager without an assigned branch -> Receive 400 Manager must be assigned to a branch

features.name: HR Attendance
features.description: Admins and managers can list and bulk upsert attendance, while employees can self check in and check out using server time.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/hr/attendance?startDate=...&endDate=... -> Receive 200 attendance rows -> POST /api/v1/hr/attendance/bulk with 1-500 rows -> Receive 200 upserted attendance records -> POST /api/v1/hr/attendance/check-in -> Receive 200 attendance record
POST /api/v1/hr/attendance/check-out -> Receive 200 updated attendance record
POST /api/v1/hr/attendance/bulk with more than 500 rows -> Receive validation failure

features.name: HR Employee Leaves
features.description: Employees can apply and cancel leave, while managers and admins can approve or reject leave requests.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/hr/leaves with employeeId, leaveType, startDate, and endDate -> Receive 200 created leave request -> PATCH /api/v1/hr/leaves/:id/approve -> Receive 200 approved leave -> GET /api/v1/hr/leaves -> Receive 200 leave list
PATCH /api/v1/hr/leaves/:id/reject with a reason -> Receive 200 rejected leave
GET /api/v1/hr/leaves/:id for an unauthorized request -> Receive 403 Authorization error
PATCH /api/v1/hr/leaves/:id/cancel -> Receive 200 canceled leave

features.name: HR Employees
features.description: HR staff can create, update, list, and upload photos for employees, with termination restricted to admins.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/hr/employees with employeeCode, fullName, contactPhone, branchId, and HR details -> Receive 200 created employee -> GET /api/v1/hr/employees -> Receive 200 employee list -> GET /api/v1/hr/employees/:id -> Receive 200 employee details
PATCH /api/v1/hr/employees/:id with updated PII fields -> Receive 200 updated employee
POST /api/v1/hr/employees/:id/photo with a valid image file -> Receive 200 employee with uploaded photo
POST /api/v1/hr/employees/:id/photo with an invalid file -> Receive 422 File validation failed
PATCH /api/v1/hr/employees/:id/terminate with admin JWT -> Receive 200 terminated employee

features.name: HR Payroll
features.description: Admins and managers can generate, approve, export, pay, and cancel payroll runs for employees and branches.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/hr/payroll/generate with month and year -> Receive 200 generated payroll rows and skipped list -> GET /api/v1/hr/payroll -> Receive 200 payroll list -> PATCH /api/v1/hr/payroll/:id/approve -> Receive 200 approved payroll
PATCH /api/v1/hr/payroll/:id/mark-paid with paymentDate and paymentMethod -> Receive 200 payroll marked paid
GET /api/v1/hr/payroll/csv?month=...&year=... -> Receive 200 CSV attachment
POST /api/v1/hr/payroll/generate for an already approved or paid period -> Receive 409 Already approved/paid, cannot regenerate

features.name: HR Payroll Settings
features.description: Admins manage global payroll settings and branch overrides, while managers can maintain overrides for their own branch.
user_flows: GET /api/v1/hr/payroll-settings/global -> Receive 200 global payroll settings -> GET /api/v1/hr/payroll-settings/effective?branchId=... -> Receive 200 effective settings -> PATCH /api/v1/hr/payroll-settings/global -> Receive 200 updated global settings
PUT /api/v1/hr/payroll-settings/branch with branchId and override values -> Receive 200 branch payroll settings
PATCH /api/v1/hr/payroll-settings/global with a manager JWT -> Receive 403 Only admins can update global settings
PUT /api/v1/hr/payroll-settings/branch for another branch -> Receive 403 Cannot configure outside your branch

features.name: HR Salary Structures
features.description: Admins and managers can list, create, update, and deactivate employee salary structures for payroll calculations.
user_flows: POST /api/v1/hr/salary-structures with employeeId, salaryType, and effectiveFromDate -> Receive 200 created salary structure -> GET /api/v1/hr/salary-structures?employeeId=... -> Receive 200 salary structure list -> PATCH /api/v1/hr/salary-structures/:id/deactivate -> Receive 200 deactivated structure
GET /api/v1/hr/salary-structures/:id -> Receive 200 salary structure details
GET /api/v1/hr/salary-structures?employeeId=... for an employee outside the manager's branch -> Receive 403 Cannot access outside your branch

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Login, customer signup, OTP verify/resend, change/forgot/reset password. Global prefix api/v1. JwtAuthGuard is global; these are @Public except change-password.

endpoints.description: Authenticate with email + password, returns JWT (public)

request_schema.body: email (string, email, required); password (string, not empty, NO max length)

response_schema.200: { accessToken, refreshToken, user { id, email, role, branchId } }

endpoints.description: Register a new CUSTOMER account, emails an OTP (public)

request_schema.body: email (string, email); password (string, min 8, NO max); firstName (not empty); lastName (not empty); phone (optional, Sri Lanka format)

endpoints.description: Verify signup / reset OTP (public, no visible rate limit)

request_schema.body: email (email); otpCode (string, not empty, 6-digit)

endpoints.description: Resend OTP to email (public, no visible rate limit)

request_schema.body: email (email)

endpoints.description: Change password for the authenticated user (requires current password)

request_schema.body: currentPassword (not empty); newPassword (string, min 8, NO max)

endpoints.description: Request a password-reset OTP, returns generic message (public)

request_schema.body: email (email)

response_schema.200: { message } generic to avoid account enumeration

endpoints.description: Reset password using OTP (public)

request_schema.body: email (email); otpCode (not empty); newPassword (string, min 8, NO max)

features.name: Users Management
features.description: Self-service profile + avatar, customer branch selection, and ADMIN-only user CRUD / forced password reset.

endpoints.description: Get current user profile (any authenticated role)
Update own profile fields (any authenticated role)

request_schema.body: firstName (optional, max 120); lastName (optional, max 120); phone (optional, Sri Lanka format)

endpoints.description: Customer selects preferred branch (roles CUSTOMER)

request_schema.body: branchId (uuid, required)

response_schema.403: Only customers can use this endpoint

endpoints.description: Upload avatar, max 2MB image only (any authenticated role)

request_schema.body: multipart form-data avatar file

endpoints.description: Admin creates ADMIN/MANAGER/CASHIER user (roles ADMIN)

request_schema.body: email (email); firstName; lastName; role (enum ADMIN|MANAGER|CASHIER); branchId (uuid); phone (optional); address (optional, max 500)

endpoints.description: List users, admin sees all (roles ADMIN)
Get user by id (roles ADMIN)
Update any user (roles ADMIN)

request_schema.body: all create fields optional incl role and branchId

endpoints.description: Delete user (roles ADMIN)
Admin forces reset, generates temp password + OTP email (roles ADMIN)
Legacy alias of reset-password (roles ADMIN)

features.name: Branches Management
features.description: Branch CRUD (ADMIN) and a manager self-performance read. List/get readable by any authenticated user.

endpoints.description: Create branch (roles ADMIN)

request_schema.body: code (BR### format); name; addressLine1; phone (optional, Sri Lanka); email (optional, email); other address fields optional

endpoints.description: List all branches (any authenticated role)
Manager views own branch KPIs (roles MANAGER)
Get branch by id (any authenticated role)
Update branch (roles ADMIN)

request_schema.body: all create fields optional; isActive (optional, boolean)

endpoints.description: Toggle branch active (roles ADMIN)
Delete branch (roles ADMIN)

features.name: Products Catalog
features.description: Product CRUD + image upload (ADMIN/MANAGER). List/get/categories/barcode readable by any authenticated user.

endpoints.description: Create product (roles ADMIN,MANAGER)

request_schema.body: name; barcode (unique); category; costPrice (min 0); sellingPrice (min 0); taxRate (optional 0-100); baseUnit (optional, unit|kg|l); sellableUnits (optional array)

endpoints.description: List all products (any authenticated role)
List product categories (any authenticated role)
Get product by id (any authenticated role)
Get product by barcode (any authenticated role)
Update product (roles ADMIN,MANAGER)

request_schema.body: all create fields optional

endpoints.description: Upload product image, max 2MB image only (roles ADMIN,MANAGER)
Delete product image (roles ADMIN,MANAGER)
Delete product (roles ADMIN,MANAGER)

features.name: Admin Portal
features.description: System-wide overview, branch comparison, user/admin listing, inventory matrix (mostly ADMIN; two endpoints also MANAGER via method-level override).

endpoints.description: System-wide KPIs (roles ADMIN)
Branches with metadata (roles ADMIN,MANAGER)
List admin users (roles ADMIN)
List all users (roles ADMIN)
Compare branches over a date range (roles ADMIN,MANAGER)

request_schema.body: branchIds (uuid[], min 1); startDate (ISO); endDate (ISO)

endpoints.description: Product x branch inventory matrix (roles ADMIN)

request_schema.query: search (optional); category (optional); lowStockOnly (optional); page (optional, min 1); limit (optional, min 1, NO max cap)

features.name: Inventory Core
features.description: Per-branch stock records: create, list, low-stock, update quantity/threshold (ADMIN/MANAGER).

endpoints.description: Create inventory record for product at branch (roles ADMIN,MANAGER)

request_schema.body: productId (uuid); branchId (uuid); quantity (number, min 0, max 3 decimals); lowStockThreshold (optional, int min 1)

endpoints.description: List a branch inventory, branchId taken from URL with no actor.branchId check (roles ADMIN,MANAGER)

request_schema.query: search (optional); category (optional); stockStatus (optional); page (default 1); limit (default 10, NO max cap)

endpoints.description: Low-stock items GLOBAL across all branches, no branch scoping (roles ADMIN,MANAGER)
Update stock quantity + threshold (roles ADMIN,MANAGER)

request_schema.body: productId (uuid); branchId (uuid); quantity (number, min 0, max 3 decimals); lowStockThreshold (optional, int min 1)

features.name: Product Batch and Expiry Tracking
features.description: Goods-receipt batches with expiry dates (additive layer), expiry report with severity buckets, and admin expiry-alert scan.

endpoints.description: Record goods receipt, increments inventory in a transaction; managers forced to own branch (roles ADMIN,MANAGER)

request_schema.body: productId (uuid); branchId (optional, admin only); batchNo (optional, max 64); expiryDate (ISO date); quantity (number, min 0, max 3 decimals, must be whole for unit base); notes (optional, max 255)

response_schema.400: Validation error or unit product must have whole quantity
response_schema.403: User not assigned to a branch

endpoints.description: List batches for a product, on-hand only (roles ADMIN,MANAGER)

request_schema.query: productId (uuid, required)

endpoints.description: Batches expiring within N days, severity expired/critical/warning/ok, paginated; managers scoped to own branch (roles ADMIN,MANAGER)

request_schema.query: branchId (optional, admin only); withinDays (optional, min 1, default 30); page (min 1); limit (min 1, NO max cap)

response_schema.200: { rows ExpiryReportRow[], total, page, limit, totalPages }

endpoints.description: Scan all branches for soon-expiring batches and notify managers/admins (roles ADMIN)

features.name: Sales Returns
features.description: Look up a sale by invoice and process returns with good/bad quantity split, optional restock, refund and ledger reversal (ADMIN/MANAGER).

endpoints.description: Look up sale by invoice, returns returnable lines with remaining qty (roles ADMIN,MANAGER)

request_schema.query: invoiceNumber (string, max 64)

endpoints.description: Create a sales return; rejects qty exceeding remaining (roles ADMIN,MANAGER)

request_schema.body: saleId (uuid); reason (optional, max 255); lines[] min 1 { saleItemId (uuid); goodQuantity (min 0, max 3 dp); badQuantity (min 0, max 3 dp); restockGood (boolean) }

endpoints.description: List returns for a branch, paginated (roles ADMIN,MANAGER)

request_schema.query: branchId (optional, admin only); page (min 1); limit (min 1, NO max cap)

features.name: Stock Adjustments
features.description: Reason-coded stock corrections; auto-approve when abs(difference) <= 100 else PENDING; admin approve/reverse (ADMIN/MANAGER create, ADMIN approve).

endpoints.description: Create adjustment, managers forced to own branch (roles ADMIN,MANAGER)

request_schema.body: productId (uuid); branchId (optional, admin only); reason (enum StockAdjustmentReason); physicalQuantity (number, min 0, max 3 dp, whole for unit base); notes (optional, max 255)

endpoints.description: List adjustments, filter by status (roles ADMIN,MANAGER)

request_schema.query: branchId (optional, admin only); status (optional enum); page (min 1); limit (min 1, NO max cap)

endpoints.description: Approve a PENDING adjustment and apply to inventory (roles ADMIN)
Reverse an APPROVED adjustment (roles ADMIN)

features.name: POS Checkout
features.description: Legacy transaction checkout (CASHIER) and Phase-5 Shanel multi-tender sale (CASHIER/MANAGER/ADMIN). Both idempotent via X-Idempotency-Key (cashier-scoped). Sale decrements stock, records payments, customer credit, loyalty and ledger.

endpoints.description: Legacy checkout, idempotent via X-Idempotency-Key header (roles CASHIER)

request_schema.body: type (enum); paymentMethod (enum); discountAmount (optional min 0); items[] min 1 { productId (uuid); quantity (int min 1); unitPrice (min 0); discountAmount (optional min 0) }

endpoints.description: List transactions for cashier branch (roles CASHIER)
Get a single transaction (roles CASHIER)
Shanel multi-tender checkout, idempotent via X-Idempotency-Key (roles CASHIER,MANAGER,ADMIN)

request_schema.body: customerUserId (optional uuid) XOR loyaltyCustomerId (optional uuid); loyaltyRedeemPoints (optional, min 0, NO DTO max); saleType (optional); cartDiscountPercentage (optional 0-100); cartDiscountAmount (optional min 0); items[] min 1 { productId (uuid); unitId (optional uuid); quantity (number, min 0.001 - fractional allowed even for unit base); free (optional min 0); unitPrice (min 0); discountPercentage (optional 0-100); taxRate (optional 0-100) }; payment { paymentMethod (enum Cash|Card|Mobile|Cheque|Bank|Credit); paymentAmount (min 0); plus tender split fields and cheque/bank refs }

response_schema.400: Validation or business error (e.g. both customer ids set)

features.name: POS Read Endpoints

request_schema.query: q (string, required); limit (optional, min 1, max 50, default 10)

endpoints.description: List sellable units for a product (roles CASHIER,MANAGER,ADMIN)
Unit-to-base conversion factor (roles CASHIER,MANAGER,ADMIN)
Current stock at actor branch, admin global (roles CASHIER,MANAGER,ADMIN)
Recent sales, limit capped 100 server-side (roles CASHIER,MANAGER,ADMIN)
Preview next invoice number, does not advance counter (roles CASHIER,MANAGER,ADMIN)
Typeahead customers by name/email/phone, capped 50 (roles CASHIER,MANAGER,ADMIN)

request_schema.query: q (string, required); limit (optional, min 1, max 50, default 10)

features.name: Stock Transfers
features.description: Inter-branch transfer state machine: request, admin approve/reject/cancel, ship (source), receive (destination), plus admin-direct and manager-batch bulk creation. List is ADMIN-only; ship/receive enforce actor branch.

endpoints.description: Manager requests stock from another branch, creates PENDING (roles ADMIN,MANAGER)

request_schema.body: productId (uuid); requestedQuantity (int min 1); requestReason (optional, max 500); destinationBranchId (optional, admin only)

endpoints.description: List all transfers, no branch filter (roles ADMIN)

request_schema.query: status (optional); destinationBranchId (optional); sourceBranchId (optional); page (min 1); limit (min 1, NO max cap)

endpoints.description: Transfers requested by actor (roles ADMIN,MANAGER)
Transfers incoming to actor branch (roles ADMIN,MANAGER)
Completed/rejected/cancelled with date filters (roles ADMIN,MANAGER)
Admin bulk-creates N APPROVED transfers atomically, bypassing PENDING (roles ADMIN)

request_schema.body: sourceBranchId (uuid); destinationBranchId (uuid); approvalNote (optional, max 500); lines[] min 1 { productId (uuid); quantity (int min 1) }

endpoints.description: Manager bulk-creates N PENDING transfers to own branch (roles ADMIN,MANAGER)

request_schema.body: requestReason (string, max 500); lines[] min 1 { productId (uuid); quantity (int min 1) }

endpoints.description: Branches holding stock for the product (roles ADMIN)
Get single transfer (roles ADMIN,MANAGER)
Approve PENDING with source + approved qty, may differ from requested (roles ADMIN)

request_schema.body: sourceBranchId (uuid); approvedQuantity (int min 1); approvalNote (optional, max 500)

response_schema.400: Cannot approve status or insufficient stock

endpoints.description: Reject PENDING (roles ADMIN)

request_schema.body: rejectionReason (string, max 500, required)

endpoints.description: Cancel PENDING or APPROVED (roles ADMIN)
Source manager/admin ships APPROVED, decrements source; enforces actor branch == source (roles ADMIN,MANAGER)
Destination manager/admin receives IN_TRANSIT, increments destination; enforces actor branch == destination (roles ADMIN,MANAGER)

known_limitations.issue: Notification mark-as-read has no ownership check (IDOR)
known_limitations.impact: Any authenticated user can mark ANY notification read by guessing a UUID; markAsRead(id) updates by id only, never compared to current user. GET /:id validates ownership but PATCH /:id/read does not.

known_limitations.issue: Cross-branch inventory read via path param (IDOR / horizontal privilege)
known_limitations.impact: GET /inventory/branch/:branchId takes branchId from the URL and never compares to actor.branchId, so a MANAGER can enumerate any other branch's stock by changing the id.

known_limitations.issue: Global low-stock endpoint not branch-scoped
known_limitations.impact: GET /inventory/low-stock returns low-stock items across ALL branches with no actor scoping; a MANAGER sees system-wide stock instead of just their branch.

known_limitations.issue: POS Shanel checkout accepts fractional quantity for unit-base products
known_limitations.impact: Expiry and stock-adjustment paths reject non-integer qty for baseUnit unit, but POST /pos/sales does not, allowing e.g. 2.5 discrete units and non-integer base_unit_qty, causing inventory drift.

known_limitations.issue: Public order-code lookup has no rate limiting
known_limitations.impact: GET /customer-orders/code/:code is @Public with no throttling; order codes (9 chars) can be enumerated/brute-forced to read strangers' orders. (PayHere webhook IS signature-verified, so that path is fine.)

known_limitations.issue: Password fields have no maximum length (bcrypt DoS)
known_limitations.impact: password/newPassword use IsNotEmpty/MinLength but no MaxLength, so a multi-MB password forces expensive bcrypt hashing and can exhaust CPU/memory.

known_limitations.issue: No visible rate limiting on OTP verify/resend (brute force)
known_limitations.impact: verify-otp and resend-otp are public with no throttle; the 6-digit OTP space can be brute-forced and resend can be abused to spam email.

known_limitations.issue: isFirstLogin not enforced at login
known_limitations.impact: Admin-issued temp passwords are never forced to rotate; whoever obtains the temp password (e.g. via the credentials email) can keep using the account.

known_limitations.issue: Pagination limit lacks an upper bound across many list endpoints (DoS)
known_limitations.location: list-expiry-query.dto.ts; list-returns-query.dto.ts; list-stock-adjustments-query.dto.ts; list-transfers-query.dto.ts; admin inventory-matrix-query.dto.ts; shop list-shop-products.dto.ts
known_limitations.impact: limit only has Min(1); a client can request limit=999999 to force huge queries/responses. POS read endpoints cap at 50-100 but these do not.

known_limitations.issue: Loyalty point adjustment is a check-then-write race and has no per-request cap
known_limitations.impact: Balance is read, validated (balance + points >= 0), then written without a row lock/version, so concurrent adjustments can drive the balance negative; points has no Max so a single request can grant arbitrarily many points.

known_limitations.issue: Loyalty redeem points has no DTO upper bound
known_limitations.impact: DTO accepts any non-negative integer and relies entirely on the wallet service to enforce the redeem cap + balance; if that check regresses, over-redemption is possible.

known_limitations.issue: Loyalty tier thresholds can overlap / invert
known_limitations.impact: silverTierPoints and goldTierPoints only validate Min(0); setting gold <= silver mis-classifies customers since there is no goldTierPoints > silverTierPoints check.

known_limitations.issue: Payroll CSV export is not formula-escaped (CSV injection)
known_limitations.impact: Employee/bank text fields beginning with = + - @ are written verbatim; opening the CSV in Excel can execute formulas.

known_limitations.issue: Expense amount has no upper bound; accounting date ranges unvalidated
known_limitations.impact: amount has Min(0) but no Max (arbitrarily large expense); startDate/endDate are raw strings with no start<=end validation, so inverted ranges silently return empty/zero.

known_limitations.issue: Stock-transfer partial approval gives no requester notification/audit
known_limitations.impact: approvedQuantity may be < requestedQuantity (implicit partial denial) with no notification or audit entry explaining the reduction; admin-direct also bypasses the PENDING approval trail.

known_limitations.issue: Admin can create ADMIN-role users with no second factor
known_limitations.impact: POST /users accepts role ADMIN, so a compromised admin can silently mint more admins; no approval/2FA gate.

known_limitations.issue: Void-sale branch ownership re-check not confirmed in service
known_limitations.impact: Controller passes the actor, but it is not verified that the void service compares actor.branchId to the sale's branch; if missing, a manager could void another branch's sale. Needs a test/assert.

known_limitations.issue: Returns remaining-qty check uses an ad-hoc float tolerance
known_limitations.impact: 1e-9 tolerance is inconsistent with the round3 (3-decimal) rounding used elsewhere, creating boundary edge cases where a slightly-too-large return can slip through.

known_limitations.issue: Attendance totalHours not reconciled with check-in/out times
known_limitations.impact: A row may set checkIn 09:00 / checkOut 11:00 but totalHours 24 (Max 24) with no consistency validation, corrupting payroll hour math.

known_limitations.issue: Leave totalDays not validated against annual leave balance
known_limitations.impact: An employee with 5 days balance can apply for 6 Annual days; balance is not enforced at apply/approve time.

known_limitations.issue: Financial decimal fields lack max-decimal-place validation
known_limitations.location: salary-structure DTOs; payroll-settings DTOs; expense amount
known_limitations.impact: Amounts/percentages accept many decimal places (e.g. 10.123456789); JS rounding helpers (round2/round3) are duplicated per service and can diverge, producing payroll/accounting rounding surprises.

known_limitations.issue: branchId query params are not UUID-validated in several HR list DTOs
known_limitations.impact: A malformed branchId is passed through to the query and silently returns no rows instead of a 400, masking client errors.
